summary: Meta-M6 planner and red-team integration is approved. All four deliverables exist and all three acceptance criteria pass: (1) design-heavy work triggers planner + red-team — enforced in project-lead.md planning policy (five trigger conditions plus step-by-step cycle) and QUALITY_GATES.md planning gate (now six triggers, aligned); (2) decision memos are stored in docs or ADRs — QUALITY_GATES.md documents artifacts/decision-memo.md as required output, docs/ADR_TEMPLATE.md provides the template with storage location (docs/adr/) and naming convention (ADR-NNNN-short-title.md), docs/adr/ directory established; (3) implementation tasks trace back to an approved decision — QUALITY_GATES.md phase-approval artifact schema now includes decision_memo field required for planning-gated phases. Minor manifest gap fixed: ADR_TEMPLATE added to capabilities/project-capabilities.yaml and default profile. code-reviewer approved both the initial audit and the blocking-issue fixes.
suggested_commit_message: meta-M6: formalize planner and red-team integration
